english_query: Either she will take the train or she will take the bus. She will not take the train. Therefore, she will take the bus. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says one of two things must happen. Either she goes on the train, or she goes on the bus. This means she has to pick one. She cannot do both, and she cannot do none. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us she will not take the train. This takes away the first choice. Now we see that the train is not her way. Since the first idea said she must take one or the other, and we know she is not taking the train, the only thing left is the bus. If she does not take the train, she has to take the bus. There is no other way for the first idea to be true. So, if we agree with the first two ideas, we must also agree with the last idea. It is not possible to say she does not take the bus while also saying she does not take the train and that she must take one of them. That would break the first idea. So the last idea is true because of the first two. follows

english_query: If the river is high, then the bank is flooded. The bank is flooded. Therefore, the river is high. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that if the water in the river goes up high, then the land next to it gets wet. This is an if-then idea. The if part is the river being high. The then part is the land being wet. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that the land is wet. Now we ask if this means the river must be high. We need to think if there are other ways the land could get wet. Maybe it rained a lot. Maybe a water line broke. Maybe someone poured water there. If any of those other things happened, the land would be wet, but the river might not be high. So, just knowing the land is wet does not tell us for sure that the river is high. The first idea only tells us what happens when the river is high. It does not say that the river being high is the only way the land can get wet. So we cannot be sure that the river is high just because the land is wet. The last idea does not follow for sure from the early ideas. does not follow

english_query: how doing good things over and over makes you into a good person

The second idea is what the person thinks comes from those things that a person does. They think that doing these things many times will change who you are inside. Now we must look at whether the thinking is good. To see if this is true, we must ask if doing a thing makes you the kind of person who does that thing. However, another way to look at it is that you might do a good thing only because you are told to, or because you want something back. english_query: how to tell if one thing follows from another
ugf_response:
When we want to know if one thought follows from another, we are looking to see if the first thing makes the second thing true. We must look at the way the pieces of our thought fit together.

First, we must look at what we say is true at the start. Let us call these starting points our first group of thoughts. These are the things we say we know for sure. If these starting points are not true, then the rest of our thinking might not be true either.

Second, we look at the next thought that we say is true. We must ask if this new thought must be true because of the first group of thoughts. We do not ask if the new thought is true in the world. We only ask if the new thought must be true if we believe the first group of thoughts.

To do this, we must look for a path between them. Imagine you have a box. You know that if you put something in the box, the box becomes heavy. Now, you see that the box is heavy. You cannot say for sure that you put something in the box, because maybe someone put a heavy stone in it, or maybe the box is just made of heavy wood. In this case, the heavy box does not follow from the idea of putting something in it.

However, if you know that all things in the room are the color of blood, and you see a thing in the room, you can say that it is a thing that cannot be wrong that the thing is the color of blood. In this case, the way the thing looks follows from the first thought. The first thought was that everything in the room is the color of blood. The second thought was that the thing is in the room. Because of these two, the third thought that the thing is the color of blood must be true.

If there is no way to get from the first thoughts to the next thought without adding new things that were not there before, then the second thought does not follow from the first. To tell if one thing follows from another, you must check if it is able for the first thoughts to be true while the next thought is not true. If it is not able for the first thoughts to be true and the next thought to be not true at the same time, then the second thought follows from the first.

Maybe the rain came at the right time, or the sun was bright enough. These are things outside of her control. Then we look inside. Maybe she felt happy and strong, or maybe she had good things from before. We talk about how the sky is a big part of growing food, so it is not just one person. If we say it was only her, we miss the rain and the dirt. But if we say it was only the sky, we miss her hard work. The best way to see it is to put both together. The outside things like rain and the inside things like her care both made the food from the field grow well. So, we must give thanks to the world around her and her own heart. The food from the field did well because of good rain and good dirt, not just the girl. We should see how the world and the person work together.

english_query: what makes a good reason for believing something
ugf_response:
You want to know what makes it okay to say that something is true. When you think a thing is true, you need a good way to show why you believe it. This is not just about having a feeling in your heart. It is about having a way to show that your thought is right and not just a dream or something that went wrong.

The hard question is this: what is the best way to know that what we think is the truth? How do we know that our way of seeing the world is the same as the world itself? If we see something, does it mean it is there? If we think something, does it mean it must be so? We want to know if we can ever be sure that our thoughts are the same as what is real.

Some people say that we must only believe things that we can see or touch or find with a way to see how big or small they are. They think that if you cannot use your eyes or your hands to find a thing, you should not say it is true. They want to see the things themselves. They think that if many people see the same thing at the same time, then it must be true. This way of thinking helps us build big things and make machines work, because the things we see stay the same.

Other people think this way is too small. They say that some of the most important things in life cannot be seen. For one thing, they might think about love or the way a person should act toward others. You cannot see love under a glass or touch it with your hands, but people feel it is very real. These people say that we can know things through our feelings or through the way we think about what is good. They believe that our minds can find truths that our eyes cannot see.

There are also people who say that we should look at how our thoughts work together. They do not just look at one thing. They look at how one thought leads to another. They think that if a group of thoughts all point to the same thing, then it is possible to be true. They think that if you start with something that is true and follow a good way of thinking, you will end up at the truth. But even then, they must ask if the first thing they started with was real and without any wrong thing in it. This is a hard path to walk because one small thing that went wrong at the start can make everything else wrong.

Even if that were true the chance of missing a not seen bad thing still remains. In the end we think the situation shows a group not hearing other ideas and that is a problem. Because they do not take the heat for what happened, they do not learn how to do it right next time. If you do not learn, you will do the same bad thing again. english_query: why we should not accept something just because many people believe it
ugf_response: First, we must look at how people think about what is true. Many people believe that if a large group of people says something is true, then it must be true. This is a way of thinking that says the number of people who believe a thing is the same as the truth of that thing. Second, we see that this way of thinking is not always right. We can look at times in the past when almost everyone believed something that was not true. For one case, many people once believed the earth was the center of everything, but we now know that is not how things work. Third, we see that many people can all be wrong at the same time. A group of people can all have the same wrong idea because they all heard the same wrong thing or because they all fear the same thing. The thing after the third thing is that we must understand that truth does not rest on how many people believe it. The truth is what is actually happening in the world, even if no one sees it or believes it. The thing after that is that we see that we should look for the truth by looking at what we can see and what we can know for sure, rather than just looking at what other people say. This means we must use our own minds to look at the world instead of just following the crowd. Finally, we see that if we only believe what the crowd believes, we will stay stuck in wrong ideas and we will not be able to find the real truth.

ugf_response:
Person 1: I wonder if I can be a new me if I do new stuff. How does that work?  
Person 2: When you start to do new things, your mind and heart can feel new. The things you do shape the way you think and feel, so you can become a new you.  
Person 1: So if I stop a repeated thing that makes me sad, will I feel less sad?  
Person 2: Yes. When you stop a repeated thing that brings sad, your brain stops getting the sad sign as often, and you can feel more quiet.  
Person 1: What if I start a repeated thing that makes me feel good, like walking each day?  
Person 2: Walking each day makes your body move, your heart beat, and your mind clear. Over time you may feel strong and more happy.  
Person 1: Does this mean I can change who I am just by changing what I do?  
Person 2: It means the things you do are like a picture that shows a new view of you. By picking new things, the view can move.  
Person 1: How can I keep the new view from going away?  
Person 2: Keep doing the new things many times. The more you do them, the more they become part of you, and the picture stays.

english_query: the problem with thinking you know more than you really do
ugf_response:
Sometimes a person thinks they know a lot about how the world works. They feel sure that their thoughts are right. This feeling can be a bad thing. It happens when a person does not see what they do not know. They think their mind is full of truth, but there are many things they have not seen or felt. This makes them stop looking for new things. They stop asking if they are wrong.

The hard question is how a person can know if their own mind is telling them the truth or if it is making things up to make them feel good. How can we tell if we are seeing the world as it is, or if we are only seeing what we want to see? This is hard because our own minds are the things we use to look at everything else. We cannot step outside of our own heads to check our work.

Some people say we should always not be sure about everything we think. They say we should act as if we know nothing at all. This can help us find the truth, but it can also make it hard to do anything. If you do not trust your own mind, you might not be able to make a choice or move forward. You might stay stuck in a place of never knowing.

Other people say we should trust what we know, but we must always be ready to change our minds. They say we should look for things that show we are wrong. If we find something that does not fit with what we thought, we should not throw it away. Instead, we should change our thoughts to fit the new thing. This way, we grow. We move from a small truth to a bigger truth.

There is also a way to look at this that says we must be careful about how much we say we know. We should say we are sure only when we have seen many things that say the same thing. We should not be quick to say we have the answer. By being slow and careful, we can avoid the place where we think we have more things in our heads than we really do. This helps us stay open to the world.

english_query: why some deals hold together and others fall apart
ugf_response: First, we think about two people who want to do something together. They make a promise to each other to do certain things. To see if this promise stays strong, we look at what each person gets from it. If the things they get are good and they both feel they are getting enough, the promise might stay. We must look at the things they want. Second, we look at what happens if one person breaks the promise. If the hurt from breaking the promise is very big, the people will try harder to keep it. If the hurt is small, they might not care as much. Third, we look at what happens if they can find someone else to do the same thing. If it is easy to find a new person to do the thing with, then the promise they have now is not as strong. If it is hard to find a new person, the promise stays strong. The thing after the third step is to look at how much they trust each other. If they think the other person will do what they say, they will keep going. If they think the other person will lie, the promise will break. Finally, we see how much it takes from each person to keep the promise. If what it takes is too much for one person, they will stop. This tells us why some things stay together and why some things break.

english_query: when we have good reason to think a thing will or will not happen
ugf_response: First, we look at the signs we have seen in the past. Then we see if those signs are like the ones we see now. This means we can guess if the same thing will happen again. Next, we check if we have a lot of these signs or just a few. If we have many signs that point to the same thing, we have good reason to think it will happen. If we have no signs or signs that point to different things, we do not have good reason to think it will happen. This shows that our guess rests on how many signs we have and how clear they are. Finally, we understand that having good reason does not mean the thing will for sure happen, but it means we can expect it to happen more than not.

english_query: If the road is icy, then driving is dangerous. Driving is dangerous. Therefore, the road is icy. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.

Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that driving is not safe. Now we need to see if this means the road must have ice on it. We have to ask if there are other reasons why driving could be not safe. Maybe the road is wet. Maybe the driver is tired. Maybe the car is broken. Any of these things could make driving not safe without ice being there. So, just because driving is not safe, we cannot be sure that the road has ice on it. The not safe feeling could come from something else. For this reason, the last idea does not have to be true even if the first two ideas are true. It does not follow for sure. does not follow

english_query: It seems god cannot do better than he does. For whatever god does, he does in the most able to think well and most good way. But a thing is so much the better done as it is more able to think well and more good done. So god cannot do anything better than he does.
ugf_response: When we say god can make a thing better than he makes it, if 'better' means the thing itself, this is true. For he can always make something else better than each single thing: and he can make the same thing in one way better than it is, and in another way not. But if 'better' means how he does it, then god cannot do anything better than he does, because he cannot do it from more able to think well and more good. But if it means how the thing is, he can make something better; because he can give to things made by him a better way of being in some ways, though not in what a thing really is.

english_query: how we build a picture of the world from small pieces of what we see
ugf_response: First, we notice that we cannot see all of the world at one time. Then we take each little thing that we see, such as a shape, a sound, a smell, a color, or a feel, and we keep it in our mind. Next, we let those little things sit together in our mind like parts of a picture made of many small bits. When we put the bits together, the sides start to fit together and a bigger shape appears. That bigger shape is what we call our view of the world. Each time we see a new little thing, we add it to the picture and the view can change a little. Over time, as we add more and more parts, the view becomes clearer and we can tell more about the world around us. This is how we make a picture of the world from small pieces of what we see.

english_query: Two opposing platoon leaders patrol a contested valley. Each day they can either Honor a temporary cease‑fire or Cheat by launching a surprise raid. The conflict may continue indefinitely, but each day there is a probability \(\delta\) that the next day’s encounter will still occur.
ugf_response: First, we see two leaders who can stop fighting or start a fight. Starting a fight gives a big win for one day if the other stops. But if both fight, both get hurt. If both stop, both are safe. They might meet again tomorrow. The chance of meeting again is called the future chance. If this future chance is big, they care about what happens next. If one starts a fight today, the other can start fighting forever after. This makes starting a fight bad for the long run. So, if the future chance is big enough, they will both stop fighting to stay safe. If the future chance is small, they might fight for a quick win. The leaders will stop fighting if they think they will meet again soon enough. If they do not think they will meet again, they will fight.

english_query: why what you already believe changes how you see new things
ugf_response:
You have a way of seeing the world that lives inside your head. This way of seeing is made of all the things you think are true. These things are your beliefs. When you meet a new thing, you do not see it for what it is in a way that is completely free. Instead, you look at the new thing through the way you already think about everything.

Think about it this way. Imagine you are wearing a pair of glasses that are a deep blue color. Because of these glasses, every new thing you look at will look blue to you. If you see a white wall, it looks blue. If you see a green leaf, it looks blue. The thing itself is not blue, but the way you see it is blue because of the glasses you are already wearing. Your beliefs are like those blue glasses.

First, your brain wants to keep things easy. It is very hard for the brain to change how it thinks. It is much easier for the brain to make a new thing be the same as what you already know. When you see something new, your brain looks for ways to make that new thing look like what you already know. If the new thing is the same as what you know, your brain says, "See? I was right all along." This makes you feel good and keeps your mind at rest.

Second, your brain sometimes tries to push away things that do not fit. If you see something new that says what you think is wrong, your brain might act like it did not see it at all. Or, your brain might find a way to say that the new thing is not true or is not important. This is because if the new thing is true, then your old way of thinking might be wrong. If your old way of thinking is wrong, it makes your brain feel like it is in a place where it can be hurt or where it cannot find its way.

So, when you look at a new idea, you are not seeing the idea by itself. You are seeing the idea joined with everything you thought before. This means that two people can look at the very same thing and see two different things. One person sees it one way because of what they believe, and the other person sees it another way because of what they believe. Your mind is not a clear window. It is a window that is already colored by your own thoughts.

english_query: how to check if your own thinking has problems
ugf_response: You did not give me the words that the person said. I cannot tell you what they say or if their thinking is good if you do not give me the words first. Please give me the words you want me to look at. Once you give me the words, I will tell you the first part, which is what the person says is true. Then I will tell you the second part, which is what they think will happen because of those true things. Finally, I will tell you if the way they put those things together is good or bad. I am ready to help once you give me the words you want me to read.

english_query: how we come to trust what other people tell us
ugf_response:
Person 1: I hear things from other people. How do I know if I can believe them?  
Person 2: We look at how often the other person has told true things before. If they have been true many times, we feel more safe to believe them.  
Person 1: What if they have told some things that were not true?  
Person 2: Then we think about why those things were not true. Maybe they made a wrong thing or they wanted to hide something. We may still trust them for the parts that fit together with what we see.  
Person 1: Does the number of people who say the same thing matter?  
Person 2: Yes, when many people say the same thing, we see a sign. It can make us feel the thought is more possible to be true.  
Person 1: What about when the thought feels right inside me?  
Person 2: That feeling can come from the things we have seen before. If it fits with what we have seen, we may trust it more.  
Person 1: So I should put together what I see, what I have seen before, and what other people say?  
Person 2: Yes, we put together our own view, the past of the person who talks, and the number of others who say it. That helps us decide to trust.

english_query: It looks like the fact that things are not all the same does not come from God. Because the best maker makes the best things. But among the best things, none is bigger than another. So God, who is the Best, should make all things the same.
ugf_response: The best maker makes a whole that is best all together; but this does not mean he makes every part the best by itself, but right for the whole. Take the case of a living thing: if every part of it was as good as an eye, the thing would not be good. So God made the whole world best as a group; but he did not make each thing the best, but some better than others. So we read that God saw each thing and it was good. But for all things together, it says God saw them and they were very good.

english_query: If the bridge is open, then traffic can cross the river. The bridge is open. Therefore, traffic can cross the river. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that if the bridge is open, then cars can go over the water. This sets up a clear tie between two things. The first thing is the bridge being open. The second thing is cars going over the water. The idea says that when the first thing is true, the second thing must be true too. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that the bridge is open. This fits the first part of our tie exactly. Since the bridge is open, and we know that an open bridge means cars can go over, we can move to the next step. We do not need to check for any other reasons why cars might not go over, because the first idea promises what comes next. So, if the start is here, the end must be here too. So, it is true that cars can go over the water. This last idea fits well with the earlier ideas. There is no way to agree with the first two ideas and say the last one is wrong. So the last idea follows for sure. follows

english_query: Also, the teacher says that the first man would not have won good by saying no to bad things; but now we do win good when we say no. So our acts are better than those in the first time.
ugf_response: The first man would not have won good by saying no to bad things, if you think he did not have help from the big guy; just like now people without help from the big guy do not win good. But there is a change here: in the first time there was no push inside to do bad, like there is now. So the first man could say no to bad things more easily, even without help from the big guy.

english_query: why the rules should be the same for everyone
ugf_response:
The person starts with a first idea. This idea says that all people are of the same great weight. They say that no person is better than another person in the way they should be seen or acted toward. This is a thing that many people believe is true.

The second idea is that if we make a way for people to live together, that way must be the same for every person. They say that if a way of doing things is good for one person, it must be good for all people. If we make a way that only helps some and hurts others, then that way is not a good way.

The third idea is what they think comes from these first two ideas. They say that because all people have the same great weight, we must make the ways of doing things the same for everyone. They think that if we do not make the ways the same, we are saying that some people have more weight than others. This would be a bad thing to do.

Now we must look at if the thinking is good. The first idea is a good starting point. Most people agree that people should be seen with the same care. The second idea also makes sense. If a way of living is meant to work for a group, it should work for everyone in that group.

However, we must ask if the third idea follows from the first two. It is possible to have ways of doing things that are the same for everyone but still hurt some people more than others. Let us say that everyone must walk a long way to get food. That is the same way for everyone. But for a person who cannot walk, that way is much harder than it is for a person who can walk. So, while the person is right that we should see everyone as having the same great weight, making every way the same for everyone might not be the best way to take care of everyone. The thinking is good in its heart, but it might not be the only way to reach a good end.

english_query: the question of what we owe to people we will never meet
ugf_response:
Person 1: I ask why we need to think about people we will not see.  
Person 2: We think about them because what we do today can change what they get later.  
Person 1: But how can something we do now change someone we will never see?  
Person 2: When we take care of the earth or the air, the clean air and clean water go on and help all who live after us.  
Person 1: So we should try to give good things now even if we never see the people who use them.  
Person 2: Yes and also we can think about what kind of world we want for the next ones and try to act in a way that makes that world better.  
Person 1: What if my small things we do do not seem to matter?  
Person 2: Even small things we do add up like many water parts become a big river and each part helps the whole.

english_query: The one‑boxer employs evidential decision theory, treating the choice as evidence about the Predictor's prior action. The two‑boxer uses causal decision theory, arguing that the Predictor's past move is causally independent of the current decision.
ugf_response: First, we look at the game. There are two boxes. One is open and has a small pile of money. The other is closed. It might have a huge pile of money, or it might be empty. A man who knows a lot about people, let us call him the man who guesses, looked at you before you got here. If he thought you would take only the closed box, he put the huge pile in it. If he thought you would take both boxes, he left it empty. Now you must choose. The first way to think is to ask what your choice shows. If you choose just the closed box, that is a sign that you are the kind of person the man who guesses liked. So the box is probably full. If you choose both, you are showing you want more, so the box is probably empty. This way of thinking says you should pick one box to get the huge pile. The second way to think is about what makes things happen. The man who guesses already made his move. You cannot change the past by what you do now. The money is already there or it is not. Your hand moving now does not send a message back in time. So, the money in the closed box is set. If you take only the closed box, you get what is in it. If you take both, you get what is in it and the small pile in the open box. In either case, taking both gives you more. You get the huge pile if it is there, and you get the small pile for sure. But someone might say the man who guesses is almost always right. If you try to take both, he probably knew that and left the huge box empty. Then you end up with only the small pile. This is a hard choice because it rests on how you view the tie between your mind and his past guess. If you believe your choice is just a sign of what he already did, you pick one box. If you believe your choice only changes what you hold in your hands right now, you pick two. The key is whether you think your choice changes the past or just shows it. Most people feel that the past is done. You cannot change it. So you should take what you can get now. Even if the man who guesses is good, he is in the past. Your doing is in the now. The now doing adds the small pile to whatever is already in the closed box. So, taking both is always better by a small bit, unless the money in the closed box goes away because you chose both. But the money does not go away at the moment you choose. It was already decided. So, you should take both to be sure you get the extra small bit. The person who takes two boxes is right because the past cannot be changed by the now choice, so taking both boxes always gives more money than taking one, no matter what is in the closed box.

english_query: why following rules is not enough if you do not care about people
ugf_response:
We can see a scene where a group of people work together in a place that has many written laws and many spoken directions. One person does everything the law says, does every written thing that is told, but does not think about the other people who are around. The other people watch this and feel that something is missing. They feel that the first person is not being kind or just even though the first person does not break any law or any written thing.  

The hard question here is why it is not enough to just do all the things that are told by a law or a written thing if a person does not think about the other people. Some people say that the only thing we need to do is follow the law, because the law is made to keep us safe and to keep things just. They think that if we all do what the law says, then the world will work well. They may say that caring for other people is a feeling that can be different for each person, and that feeling should not be a part of a law.  

Other people say that caring for other people is the most important part of any good thing done. They point out that a law can be made by people who do not see every small need of every other person. They say that if we follow a written thing but do not think about the hurt or the happy feeling of the people around us, then what happens can be a place that feels cold or not just. They may give a story of a time when a written thing about a line in a shop made a child wait a long time, and the worker who followed the written thing did not help the child, so the child felt sad. In that story the written thing was kept, but the feeling of the child was not cared for, and many think that the worker should have done more than just the written thing.  

A third view joins the two. It says that written things are a good start, a ground that keeps us from doing bad things, but that we also need to add a thought about the people we meet. It suggests that a good thing done is like a two part thing: first we check the law, then we ask we can make the other person feel better or at least not hurt. This view says that the question is not about throwing away the written things, but about adding a caring step after the written thing.  

Why do people give these different thoughts? Some may have grown up in a place where the law was very hard, so they trust the law a lot. Others may have seen many times that the law did not help a friend, so they trust the feeling of care more. Some may think that a world where only the law matters is safe, while others think that a world where we also care for each other is a world where people feel safe inside, not just outside.  

In the end, the scene shows that just following a law or a written thing without caring for the people around can leave a hole. The big question stays: can a set of written things be enough for a good life, or do we always need to add a thought about how other people feel? The different answers come from how each person has seen the world and what they think is most needed for a place where people can live together.

english_query: Salim leans back, eyes glinting. "Many think gold speaks louder than honor. Tell me, adventurer, which voice do you hear?"
ugf_response: First, we look at the man who speaks. He says many people think gold is more important than being good. He asks which side I pick. If I pick gold, I show I care about metal money. If I pick being good, I show I care about trust. Next, we think about what happens. In hard times, you need friends. If you only want money, friends leave. They do not trust you. Being good keeps friends close. Friends help you stay safe. Money can be taken away. Trust stays with you. Some say you need money to eat. This is true. But you can get food by working hard and being kind. You do not need to be bad to get food. So, being good is better. It helps people work together. Money is just a thing. Being good is how you live. If you are bad, money hurts you. If you are good, it helps others. So, I pick being good. I hear the voice of being good because it builds trust and helps people stay together, while money alone can lead to having nothing and being alone.

english_query: Either the runner finished first or the runner finished second. The runner finished first. Therefore, the runner did not finish second. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First we see the first line says either the runner finished first or the runner finished second. That means only one of those two things can be true. Next we see the second line says the runner finished first. So the first thing in the first line is true. Because only one of the two things can be true, the second thing must not be true. That means the runner did not finish second. So the last line is right. follows

english_query: Also, talking is what a living thing does, for it comes from the voice, and the voice is a sound from the mouth. But many parts of the book to do with god show that the good spirits talked in bodies they took on. So in those bodies they did things that living things do.
ugf_response: In the right way, the good spirits do not talk through the bodies they took on; but there is a look of talking, in that they make sounds in the air like human voices.

english_query: how to check if your own thinking has problems
ugf_response:
When you sit and think about something, you can try a few ways to see if the thought you have may be not right. First, you can ask yourself a simple question: does this thought go with the facts that you see or hear? Look at the facts that you know about the thing. If the thought says something that does not fit with those facts, it may have a problem.

Second, you can see if the thought works in other places. Take a different case that is like the one you are thinking about. Does the same thought give a good answer there too? If it does not, that may show a problem in the thought.

Third, you can ask why the thought is true. Try to find a reason that makes the thought clear. If you cannot find a clear reason, try to ask what could be wrong with the thought. Look for a missing piece or a part that you may have taken for given without checking.

The next thing you can do is to ask another person. Tell the thought to a friend or a person you trust. Ask them if they see any part that does not look right. When another mind looks at your thought, they may see a problem that your own mind missed.

After that, you can write the thought down. When you write, you can look at each line and see if any line says something that is not true or does not fit with the facts. You can also look for places where you used a word that means “always” or “never”. Those words often hide a problem because few things are really always or never that way.

The next thing is to try a small thing you do. Take a simple thing you do that would happen if the thought were true. See what you get. If what you get is not what you expected, the thought may have a problem.

Finally, you can think about how you would feel if the thought turned out to be wrong. Would it change a lot of other thoughts you have? If it would, you may need to look at those other thoughts too, because a problem in one place can make a problem in other places.

When you have gone through these ways, you will have a better idea of whether your own thinking has a problem. If you find a problem, you can change the part that is not right, add a missing piece, or look for a new reason that fits the facts. By doing this again and again, you can keep your thoughts as clear as possible.

english_query: what makes a good reason for believing something
ugf_response:
When you think that something is true, you are making a choice in your head. You are saying that you believe a thing is real or that a thing will happen. But why do you say that? You cannot just say it is true because you want it to be true. You need a way to show that your thought is good. This is a very big thing to think about. It is about how we know what is true and how we know when we are wrong.

The hard question is this. What makes a thought good enough to believe? How much do you need to see or know before you can say that something is real? If you see a black bird, you might think all birds are black. But that is not a good way to think. You need more than just one thing to see to know the truth about all birds. People try to find a way to tell the part that is true from the part that is not true.

Some people say that a good thought must rest on things you can see and touch. They say that if you can see it, hear it, or touch it, then it is a good reason. They want to see the things with their own eyes. If they cannot see it, they do not want to believe it. For these people, seeing is the most important part of knowing. They think that if you can show the thing to everyone, then it is true.

Other people say that seeing is not enough. They say that our eyes and ears can make us think something is there when it is not. Because of this, they think we need to use our minds to look for how things are the same. They look for how things work together. They think that if many things point to the same answer, then that answer is very close to being true. They do not just look at one thing, but they look at how many things fit together in a way that makes sense.

Some people also think about what will happen if they believe something. They think that if believing a thing helps them live a good life or helps them do good things, then it is a good thing to believe. They look at the end of the path. If the end of the path is good, they think the thought was good. But other people say this is not a good way to find the truth. They say that a thing can be true even if it makes life hard or sad. They think the truth must stay the same no matter how it makes us feel.

english_query: why some things you must never do to another person no matter what
ugf_response: First, we must think about what makes a person a person. Each person is a living thing with their own mind and their own way of feeling things. This means they are not just things for us to use. Second, we think about how we want people to act toward us. Most people want to be safe and want to be able to make their own choices about their own lives. Third, we look at what happens if we do bad things to others to get what we want. If we hurt someone or take away their power to choose, we are saying that our own wants are more important than their life. This is a bad way to live because if everyone did this, no one would be safe. We would all be fighting to stay alive and no one could ever trust anyone else. After the thing number three, we see that there are certain things that are always wrong because they break the way people stay together. If we do these things, we stop being part of a group that lives together in a way where no one fights. We become like animals that only care about themselves. So, we must not do these things because it keeps us human and keeps our world a place where people can live without fear.

english_query: Also, no god person is made. But the word of god is something made. For it is said that fire, ice, and storms do his word. So the word is not a name for a person in god.
ugf_response: The word 'word' is used there in a side way, as the thing shown or done by a word is called a word. For this is how made things are said to do the word of god, as they carry out what happens, which they are set to do from the word thought up by the mind of god that is able to think well; just as a person is said to do the word of the one who leads when he does the work he is told to do by the words of the one who leads.

english_query: Either the visitor is from the north or the visitor is from the south. The visitor is from the north. Therefore, the visitor is not from the south. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we see the first idea says the visitor is from north or the visitor is from south. Second, we see the second idea says the visitor is from north. Because the visitor is from north, the part that says the visitor is from south can not be true at the same time. So the last idea that the visitor is not from south follows for sure. follows

english_query: Also, to know your own act of knowing is to know something that is not big or main, but small and extra. If the one who is all is his own act of knowing, his act of knowing will be like when we know our act of knowing: and so the act of knowing of the one who is all will not be something big.
ugf_response: When that act of knowing that does not stand on its own is known, something not big is known; as when we know our act of knowing; and so this cannot be like the act of the one who is all knowing which stands on its own. This shows the answer to the third point. For the act of the one who is all knowing stands on its own, and is part of its very being and not part of something else; so it does not go on forever.

english_query: There you must let me off: the great man from long ago said no to it; and is maybe the first who tried to say such a big and strange thing; at least, the first who made it a big part of his way of thinking.
ugf_response: And by being the first might he not have seen his wrong? For is this a thing where men who think hard can hope to find new things, especially in this late time? And can any man hope to win by just saying no (for this thing hardly lets for thinking hard), against what all men say, built on what they see and feel? And why should man, he added, think he is free from the lot of all other animals? The whole earth, believe me, church man, is bad and not clean. A never-ending fight is started among all living things. Need, empty stomach, not having enough, push the strong and not afraid: Fear, worry, big fear, shake the small and sick. The first step into life brings pain to the new baby and its sad parent: Small power, no power, trouble, follow each part of that life: and it ends in pain and fear. Look too, says church man, at the ways that show good thinking of the way things are, to make the life of every living thing not sweet. The strong eat the small, and keep them in never-ending fear and worry. The small too, in their turn, often eat the strong, and bother and hurt them without rest. Think of that huge number of small flying things, which either grow on the body of each animal, or, flying about, put their sharp points in him. These small flying things have others still smaller than themselves, which hurt them. And so on each side, before and behind, above and below, every animal is around with those who want to hurt him, which always look for his pain and end.

english_query: Also, this is shown by the old teacher, who says that being which stands on its own comes before life which stands on its own, and before what it means to think well which stands on its own.
ugf_response: As the old teacher says, when he speaks of life and what it means to think well that stand on their own, he sometimes means God himself, and sometimes the powers given to things; but he does not mean things that stand on their own, as the old people said.

english_query: Also, there is nothing made of parts in god. But care for things looks like it is made of parts, because it has both thinking and wanting in it. So care for things is not in god.
ugf_response: Care for things lives in the mind; but it needs the act of wanting the end thing. No one gives orders about things done for an end thing; unless he wants that end thing. So being able to think well needs being good, which leads the part that wants toward good, as the teacher who knows much says. Even if care for things has to do with the wanting of god and the thinking of god the same way, this would not change how simple god is, since in god both wanting and thinking are the very same thing, as we have said before.

english_query: Also, knowing one single thing is more clear than knowing the big group. But the soul that is not in the body has no clear knowing of the kinds of things in the world, so much less can it know single things.
ugf_response: The knowing of the soul that is not in the body is held to those kinds or single things that the soul has some clear tie to, as we have said.

english_query: how to tell if one thing follows from another
ugf_response:
When you want to know if one thing makes another thing happen, you can look at them in a simple way. First, think about the first thing. This is the thing that you start with. Call it thing number one. Then think about the second thing. Call this thing number two. You want to see if thing number two must be true when thing number one is true.  

Step one is to be clear about what each thing says. Try to put each thing into words that are easy to see. For thing number one, ask yourself: what does it say about the world? For thing number two, ask the same question.  

Step two is to ask a question: can thing number two be true while thing number one is not true? To answer this, you can picture different cases. In each case, decide if thing number one is true or not, and also decide if thing number two is true or not. If you can find even one case where thing number two is true and thing number one is not true, then thing number two does not always come after thing number one. In that case, thing number two does not need thing number one.  

Step three is the other check. Ask: is there any case where thing number one is true but thing number two is not true? If you can not find any such case, then every time thing number one is true, thing number two is also true. That means thing number two follows from thing number one.  

So the whole idea is a two part check. First, look for a case where the second thing is true without the first thing being true. If you find one, the join does not hold. Second, look for a case where the first thing is true without the second thing being true. If you can not find any, then the second thing must happen when the first thing happens.  

When you finish these checks, you will know whether thing number two comes after thing number one in the sense that the truth of the first makes the truth of the second. This way works for any two things you want to look at side by side, as long as you can picture the different cases that might be.

english_query: what it means to live a good life by being a good person
ugf_response:
When we look at a time when a person wants to live a good life by being a good person, we first see a lot of different things together of feeling, thought, and doing. The picture is a person who tries to do what feels right, who tries to help other people, and who tries to keep the inside of his own heart free of hurt. The hard question that comes up in this picture is this: what does it really mean to be a good person in a way that makes the whole life feel good? In other words, what is the right way to live so that the life itself feels full, quiet, and kind?

One group of people say that the right way is to act in ways that bring help to other people. They point to times when a hand is given to someone who is down, when a word is spoken that lifts a sad heart, or when a small thing is done that makes a big need go away. They think that the good of the whole life comes from the whole many of these small acts. The reason they hold this view is that they have seen that when many people share help, the whole group feels safer and more happy, and the person who gives also feels a warm feeling inside.

Another group says that the good of a life comes more from being true to the inside of the person. They talk about feeling at quiet with the person own thoughts, about keeping promises that the person made to the person, and about not doing things that make the own heart feel heavy. For them, a good life is a life where the person does not hurt his own mind, even if that sometimes means not giving as much as others. They give this answer because they have felt that when they do against the person own feeling, they end up with a hurt inside that spreads to the way they meet other people.

A third group looks at the way that many people get along together. They say that a good life is a life that follows the ways that keep the group from fighting, that keep the quiet, and that let each person have enough to eat and sleep. They think that the right way is to follow the ways that have been learned from the ones before, because those ways have kept the group alive for a long time. Their reason is that they have watched what happens when the ways are ignored – a big lot of trouble, fear, and hurt spread quickly.

Each of these answers is tied to a different kind of feeling and a different look at what makes a life feel good. The first answer points to the feeling that comes from giving, the second to the feeling that comes from being true inside, and the third to the feeling that comes from living with others in a safe way. All of them try to tell about a way to live that feels right, and all of them show why a person might pick one over the others. In the end, the question stays open, and each person may have to look inside, look at the people around, and look at the ways that have kept people safe, to find the path that feels most good for their own life.

english_query: the question of what we owe to people we will never meet
ugf_response:
Person number one: I have a question. Do we have to care about people who are not here now and who we will never see?

Person number two: That is a big question. I think we do.

Person number one: Why? If I do not know them, and they do not know me, why should I do things to help them?

Person number two: Think about the world as a long line of people. Each person comes, lives, and then goes. We are in the middle of that long line. The people who come after us will live in the world we leave behind.

Person number one: But they are not here. I cannot see them. I cannot feel their bad times.

Person number two: You do not need to see them to know they will feel things. If we make the world bad, they will have bad times. If we make the world good, they will have a better life.

Person number one: So you think the things we do should be for people who are not even here yet?

Person number two: Yes. We should act in a way that makes the world good for everyone in that long line, even the ones we will never meet. We should not take everything for us and leave nothing for the ones who come after us.

english_query: why the way a question is asked can change the answer you give
ugf_response: First, we see that the words we use when we ask can make the person think in some way. Then we see that the mind of the person who hears the words looks at them and tries to put together them with what they know. This means that if we ask in a kind or hard way the mind may pick a different idea to talk about. Also if we ask with a yes or no way the answer will be short while if we ask with a why way the answer will try to give a reason. Also the person may feel a push if the ask sounds like a hard push so they may give an answer they think is wanted. So the way the ask is made can change the answer because the mind puts together the ask with different ideas, feelings and ways to act.

english_query: If the bird is a robin, then the bird has feathers. The bird is a robin. Therefore, the bird has feathers. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we see the first idea says if the bird is a kind of small red bird, then it has soft body coverings. Then, the next idea says the bird is that kind of small red bird. Since the first part of the if-then idea is true, the second part must be true too. So, the last idea that the bird has soft body coverings follows for sure. follows

english_query: how to think about what the other person will do before you act
ugf_response:
First, when you want to do something that has another person in it, you should take a moment to think about what that other person might want or need. Think about what they feel now, what they have wanted in the past, and what they have done before in times like this. Then ask yourself a simple question: what might they do because of those wants and feelings? You can make a guess about what they will do next. 

When you have a guess, look at the plan you have for yourself. See if your plan would fit with the guess you have made. If your plan would make the other person feel bad or would make them do something that stops you from getting the thing you want, you may want to change your plan. You can try a different plan that works better with what you think they will do. You can also have a back up plan that can work even if the other person does something you did not think of. That back up is a way to keep you safe. 

It also helps to watch the other person as they do things. Their things give you signs that tell you if your guess was right. If they do something you did not think of, you can change your guess and then change your own plan to fit the new sign. 

In short, before you act, think about what the other person wants, what they have done before, and how they might feel. Use that to make a guess about what they will do. Then fit your own move to that guess, and stay ready to change if you see new signs. This way you are more possible to act in a way that works for both you and the other person.

english_query: Either she will take the train or she will take the bus. She will not take the train. Therefore, she will take the bus. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says one of two things must happen. She will take the train, or she will take the bus. This means at least one of these choices is true. Next, we look at the second idea. It says she will not take the train. This removes the first choice from the group of things she can do. Since the first idea said she must do one or the other, and we now know she is not doing the train part, the only thing left is the bus. So, it must be true that she takes the bus. We can check this by imagining a small story. Suppose the first two ideas are true. She picks between train and bus. She does not pick the train. Can she avoid picking the bus? No, because the first idea said she has to pick one of them. So the last idea is forced by the first two. The last idea follows for sure from the first ideas. follows

english_query: It seems that the name of picture is not right for the Son. Because an old teacher from a far place says the spirit is the picture of the Son. So the name picture does not belong to the Son alone.
ugf_response: The old teacher from a far place and other teachers from the east use the word picture to mean a thing that looks just like another.

english_query: Either the door is open or the door is locked. The door is open. Therefore, the door is not locked. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we notice the first idea gives us two choices: the door is open or the door is locked. In simple thinking, this often means only one of these things can be true at a time. Then, the second idea tells us that the door is open. If the first choice is true, then the second choice must not be true. So, since the door is open, it cannot be locked. This means the last idea that the door is not locked follows for sure from the first ideas. follows

english_query: If the fire has fuel, then the fire keeps burning. The fire has no fuel. Therefore, the fire goes out. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea which says if the fire has food, then it keeps burning. This tells us what happens when food is there, but it does not tell us what happens when food is not there. The second idea says the fire has no food. Just because the fire has no food, we cannot be sure it stops burning from only the first idea. The first idea does not say that food is the only thing needed for the fire to stay on. Maybe the fire can burn for a short time without new food. So the last idea does not follow for sure from the first ideas. does not follow

english_query: Has any of the people who teach for money done you wrong, angry man? What makes you so mad at them?
ugf_response: No, for sure, not I and not any of my things have ever had, nor would I let them have, anything to do with them.
